name: Inbound Email with Suspicious Subject
notes:
This rule triggers when an email is received with a suspicious subject or a subject conveying some sense of urgency. 

Note: The Phishing Subjects reference set is pre-populated with email subject examples and can be tuned with new discoveries.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Mail Receive
when the event matches Subject (custom) is not N/A
when any of Subject (custom) are contained in any of Phishing Subjects - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Inbound Email with Suspicious Subject on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Mail Receive
AND when the event matches Subject (custom) is not N/A
AND when any of Subject (custom) are contained in any of Phishing Subjects - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: Inbound Email With Suspicious Subject
Event description: Detects when an email is received with a suspicious subject or a subject conveying some sense of urgency.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Recipients (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
